content.en:
Next, Ye Tian encountered more and more half-step transcendent realm spirit puppets more and more.

During many battles, one of his replica bodies was also scarred.

In other half-step extradimensional realms, they would have fallen here a long time ago.

"What kind of means is this, the spirit puppet is inexhaustible, it is equivalent to an endless half-step transcendent realm, no matter how powerful the half-step transcendent realm is, there is no way to contend with it, and in the end you can only choose to escape!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, in the process of fighting these spirit puppets, he also spied a trace of the use of extradimensional rules, which was very helpful for him to understand extradimensional rules in the future.

Moreover, he also found some resources, but there are not many resources, but each resource is extremely precious, and it is a treasure that is difficult for the outside world to find.

Gradually, he came to the deepest part of this ruin.

Here, he saw a large number of spirit golems.

What's even more shocking is that these spirit golems actually began to fuse, and eventually turned into a very large spirit golem, and the aura of this spirit golem was more than ten times stronger.

However, this spirit puppet did not come to attack Ye Tian, but guarded the gate of a palace.

Obviously, this palace is the most important place for this ruin.

"Such a terrifying spirit puppet, can anyone among the powerhouses of the half-step transcendent realm defeat him?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He felt that even if he tempered his superdimensional body to the level of ninety percent and only had one last step left before breaking through the superdimensional realm, he would not be able to defeat this spirit puppet.

Ye Tian asked a replica body to go over to test this spirit puppet.

The results are clear.

Rumble!!!

With a punch, the spirit puppet directly exploded Ye Tian's copy body.

It's a spike!

Then, Ye Tian tried to let multiple replica bodies attack together to see if he could let one of the replica bodies take the opportunity to sneak in.

It's a good plan.

However, it still failed.

Ye Tian sent a total of six replica bodies to work together.

As a result, the spirit golem locked on his six replica bodies with a single punch, and exploded his six replica bodies with one punch.

Next, no matter how Ye Tian tried, he couldn't break through.

Once Ye Tian was far away, this spirit puppet would disintegrate into small spirit puppets.

Obviously, only the approach of the half-step transcendent realm would prompt these small spirit puppets to merge into large spirit puppets.

After many attempts, Ye Tian finally gave up.

"It seems that I can't enter here at the moment, maybe I won't have a glimmer of hope to enter that palace until I have further cultivated and reached the extreme of the half-step transcendent realm."

！"

Ye Tian thought so.

Subsequently, he left the place, but did not leave the ruins.

The area of this ruin is not small, and there may be other good places.

So, he continued to search.

After that, he found a lot of resources, and he was able to scrape the ruins almost clean.

However, he knew very well that the greatest chance of this ruin should be in that palace, but he was too weak to enter there.

......

Outside the ruins, there is a branch of the Ice Ghost Organization.

The Gathering Star Realm God is still here, he has not left, and he does not dare to escape.

Ye Tian left a mark of extradimensional power on his body, if he dared to escape, there was absolutely no way to evade Ye Tian's pursuit.

Unless he could find another half-step transcendent realm in time to erase the superdimensional power imprint left by Ye Tian, he couldn't find such a half-step extradimensional realm, and he didn't have time to look for it.

Therefore, he could only wait for Ye Tian here.

Of course, he still has an expectation, that is, he hopes that Ye Tian will trigger some taboo, causing Ye Tian's clone and body to fall and die.

Such forbidden power is not non-existent, it is rumored that an extradimensional realm in the 6000 Territory has multiple clones, and as a result, one of the clones provoked an unimaginable existence, all the clones were killed, and even the body that stayed in the headquarters of the 6000 Territory forces was erased.

This rumor has been around for countless years, and it is not false, but real.

So, there are some forbidden powers, really don't touch them.

Airplanes!

The entrance was turbulent, and Ye Tian walked out from inside.

"Great Chief, you're finally out!"

The God of the Gathering Star Realm hurriedly went over and said.

"This ruin is very good, but the depths of the ruins are too dangerous, I retreated!"

Ye Tian said.

The Star Gathering Realm God did not ask Ye Tian how much he had gained, but stayed behind Ye Tian silently.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tiandao.

Rushing!!

They quickly left the branch and returned to the Ice Ghost Organization headquarters through a Domain-Breaking Star Array.

In the following years, Ye Tian visited all the ruins under the command of the Ice Ghost Organization, but there was no more dangerous place than the ruins of the extradimensional realm just now.

However, he still gained a lot and made his net worth skyrocket.

After that, he left a replica body at the headquarters of the Ice Ghost Organization, where he practiced for a long time.

Of course, he didn't waste the power of the Ice Ghost Organization, and let the Ice Ghost Organization find out all kinds of information for him, maybe he encountered some chances!

......

Six Thousand Territory, Extreme Yang Realm.

Ye Tian once again entered the Peep Heaven Pavilion branch to buy information, of course, he still changed his identity to buy information.

This time, the information he wanted to buy was about the superdimensional bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

He had been to the Garan Chamber of Commerce, and the Garan Chamber of Commerce did not have the Black Scale Domain Dragon Extradimensional Bloodline, this rare bloodline was rare, and it could not be sold in normal times, and the Garan Chamber of Commerce had not specifically purchased it.

Only in a very small number of places is a drop of the Black Scale Domain Dragon's extradimensional bloodline occasionally born.

Of course, if you look carefully, you can still find it.

Although the Sky Pavilion is a pit, it still knows a lot of words about the information of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

Ye Tian spent a lot of super dimensional treasure coins, and (Zhao Li Hao) successfully purchased the Black Scale Domain Dragon information from the Peep Heaven Pavilion, this information is also the most recent information, and the information is very accurate.

"Sixteen places can obtain the intelligence of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, and it is 100% able to obtain the Black Scale Domain Dragon, and you only need to pay enough Super Dimensional Treasure Coins. The information sold by the Sky Seeping Pavilion this time is very good, and with this information, it will be easy for me to acquire some Black Scale Domain Dragon Bloodline!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Six Thousand Territory.

Qianlin Realm, Blood Refining Sect.

This is a very ordinary force, there is only one half-step extradimensional realm, and it is also the weakest kind of half-step extradimensional realm, only fused with an ordinary superdimensional bloodline, and then luckily comprehended the power of superdimensional and broke through to the half-step superdimensional realm.

However, due to the great problem of the method of transformation, after breaking through to the half-step transcendent realm, there is no more progress.

And many forces are not clear, the Blood Refining Sect has mastered a lot of Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds.
